searchSummary.selectedReason: Explicit 100 USD BountyHub reward, active deadline, agent-memory domain fit, and PR/report submission path.

rejectedCandidates.reason: Same payload-validation fix already claimed by multiple existing PRs.
Many overlapping same-net trace solver PRs already open.
Many attempts and PRs already exist; likely low expected value.
Multiple open PRs already cover the core perfect-player removal approach.
Requires exposing full initial conversation text in contributor metadata, which is not acceptable for this workspace.

job.title: Memanto Bug & Exploit Challenge [100 USD Bounty]
job.approvalGate: Do not comment, fork, open a PR, publish exploit details, or run social amplification until the owner approves a non-duplicate target and disclosure route.

responsibilities: Review issue comments, active PRs, and BountyHub criteria
Find a low-overlap Memanto flaw candidate
Classify disclosure route as public PR/report or private vulnerability
Inspect the Memanto repository after Hermes selects the target
Prepare the smallest reproducible failing test, script, report, or patch
Draft the PR body with reproduction steps and safe disclosure notes

completionStatus.blockedBy: Owner review gate, duplicate-risk scan, and possible security disclosure route
